text:
The libTicalc2 library is a multi-platform library which handles all
Texas Instruments calculators through a set of functions.

WWW: http://tilp.info/

- Naram Qashat
cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77

NOTE: This relies on the new port comms/libticables2 which I submitted
      prior to this PR.
